name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #17
description: Florentine Brainrot #17 is a auction blood marble single-panel relic built around Botticelli and CRT Goblin Ledger. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Le Trombe, used here as the witness card. Botticelli keeps showing up in the margin whenever a meme-caption escrow for delulu patrons refreshes. The fresco keeps receipts better than the family does. Serial BOTT-17 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks DUOMO at Σ 408.

attributes.value: a cartoon oracle vending machine dispensing bad alpha
